title: What To Expect From Airbnb Inc (ABNB) Q2 2024 Earnings
text: Airbnb Inc reported Q2 2024 revenue of $2.75 billion, an 11% increase compared to Q2 2023. Net Income was $555 million, representing a net income margin of 20%. Adjusted earnings of 86 cents per share for second-quarter 2024 declined 12.2% year over year. Nights and Experiences Booked were 125.1 million, up 9% on a year-over-year basis. GBV amounted to $21.28 billion, rising 11% from the prior-year quarter. The company provided forward guidance with revenues expected between $3.67 billion and $3.73 billion for the third quarter of 2024, implying year-over-year growth of 8-10% on a reported basis.
